<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Diego Cantor</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Bebas+Neue&family=Barlow:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;0,700;1,300&family=Barlow+Condensed:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
–red: #c8102e;
–red-dark: #8b0a1e;
–gold: #d4a017;
–gold-light: #f0c040;
–bg: #0a0a0b;
–bg2: #111114;
–bg3: #1a1a1e;
–text: #e8e0d0;
–muted: #8a8070;
–card-w: 260px;
–card-h: 150px;
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }
body { background: var(–bg); color: var(–text); font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif; overflow-x: hidden; }

::-webkit-scrollbar { width: 6px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(–bg); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(–red); border-radius: 3px; }

/* NAV */
nav {
position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: 100;
padding: 16px 5%;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,.9) 0%, transparent 100%);
transition: background .3s;
}
nav.scrolled { background: rgba(10,10,11,.97); border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(200,16,46,.2); }
.nav-logo img { height: 52px; display: block; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(200,16,46,.4)); }
.nav-links { display: flex; gap: 28px; }
.nav-links a {
color: var(–muted); text-decoration: none;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: .85rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
transition: color .2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover { color: var(–text); }

/* HERO */
#hero {
position: relative; height: 100vh; min-height: 600px;
display: flex; align-items: flex-end; overflow: hidden;
}
.hero-bg {
position: absolute; inset: 0;
background-image: url(‘data:image/jpeg;base64,’);
background-size: cover; background-position: center top;
transition: opacity 1.2s ease;
}
.hero-bg.bg2 { background-image: url(‘data:image/jpeg;base64,’); opacity: 0; }
.hero-bg.active { opacity: 1; }
.hero-bg.inactive { opacity: 0; }
.hero-overlay {
position: absolute; inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(0,0,0,.25) 0%, rgba(0,0,0,.1) 35%, rgba(10,10,11,.75) 72%, var(–bg) 100%);
}
.hero-side-fade {
position: absolute; inset: 0 55% 0 0;
background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(10,10,11,.85), transparent);
}
.hero-content {
position: relative; z-index: 2;
padding: 0 5% 7vh; max-width: 680px;
}
.hero-logo-wrap {
margin-bottom: 10px;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s .2s forwards;
}
.hero-logo-wrap img {
height: 110px;
filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(200,16,46,.5)) brightness(1.1);
}
.hero-title {
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif;
font-size: clamp(1.6rem, 4vw, 3rem);
letter-spacing: 10px; color: var(–gold);
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s .35s forwards;
text-transform: uppercase;
}
.hero-sub {
font-family: ‘Barlow’, sans-serif; font-weight: 300; font-style: italic;
font-size: clamp(.85rem, 1.8vw, 1.1rem);
color: var(–muted); letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
margin-top: 8px;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s .5s forwards;
}
.hero-btns {
margin-top: 32px; display: flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap;
opacity: 0; animation: fadeUp .8s .7s forwards;
}
.btn-primary {
background: var(–red); color: #fff;
padding: 13px 34px;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: .95rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
border: none; cursor: pointer;
clip-path: polygon(0 0, calc(100% - 10px) 0, 100% 100%, 0 100%);
transition: background .2s, transform .2s;
text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(–red-dark); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.btn-outline {
background: transparent; color: var(–text);
padding: 13px 34px;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: .95rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
border: 1px solid rgba(232,224,208,.3); cursor: pointer;
transition: border-color .2s, color .2s, transform .2s;
text-decoration: none; display: inline-block;
}
.btn-outline:hover { border-color: var(–gold); color: var(–gold); transform: translateY(-2px); }

@keyframes fadeUp {
from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(22px); }
to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}

/* SECTIONS */
section { padding: 60px 5%; }
.section-label {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: .7rem; letter-spacing: 4px; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(–red); margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.section-title {
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif;
font-size: clamp(2rem, 5vw, 3.2rem);
letter-spacing: 3px; color: var(–text); margin-bottom: 36px;
}
.divider {
width: 60px; height: 3px;
background: linear-gradient(to right, var(–red), var(–gold));
margin: 14px 0 36px;
}

/* VIDEOS */
#videos { background: var(–bg2); }
.row-block { margin-bottom: 44px; }
.row-label {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: .75rem; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(–gold); margin-bottom: 14px;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;
}
.row-label::after {
content: ‘’; flex: 1; height: 1px;
background: linear-gradient(to right, rgba(212,160,23,.3), transparent);
}
.cards-row {
display: flex; gap: 14px;
overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 10px;
scrollbar-width: thin; scrollbar-color: var(–red) transparent;
}
.cards-row::-webkit-scrollbar { height: 4px; }
.cards-row::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(–red); border-radius: 2px; }
.card {
flex: 0 0 var(–card-w); height: var(–card-h);
border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;
cursor: pointer;
transition: transform .3s, box-shadow .3s;
background: var(–bg3);
}
.card:hover {
transform: scale(1.07) translateY(-6px);
box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.8), 0 0 20px rgba(200,16,46,.3);
z-index: 10;
}
.card-thumb {
width: 100%; height: 100%;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif;
font-size: 1.8rem; letter-spacing: 2px;
color: rgba(255,255,255,.15); position: relative;
}
.card-thumb::before {
content: ‘’; position: absolute; inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(200,16,46,.1), rgba(212,160,23,.08));
}
.t1 { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0a0e,#3a0a15); }
.t2 { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0a0a1a,#1a1a3a); }
.t3 { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#0f0f0f,#2a1a00); }
.card-overlay {
position: absolute; inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,.88) 0%, transparent 55%);
opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.card:hover .card-overlay { opacity: 1; }
.card-play {
width: 46px; height: 46px; border-radius: 50%;
background: rgba(200,16,46,.9);
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
font-size: 1.2rem;
transform: scale(.8); transition: transform .2s;
}
.card:hover .card-play { transform: scale(1); }
.card-info {
position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
padding: 8px 12px;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; font-size: .85rem;
color: var(–text);
background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(0,0,0,.8), transparent);
transform: translateY(100%); transition: transform .3s;
}
.card:hover .card-info { transform: translateY(0); }

/* GALERIA */
#galeria { background: var(–bg); }
.gallery-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
gap: 12px;
}
.gallery-item {
aspect-ratio: 3/4; overflow: hidden; border-radius: 4px;
cursor: pointer; position: relative;
transition: transform .3s, box-shadow .3s;
}
.gallery-item:hover {
transform: scale(1.03);
box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.7), 0 0 16px rgba(200,16,46,.2);
}
.gallery-item img {
width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; object-position: top;
display: block; transition: transform .4s;
}
.gallery-item:hover img { transform: scale(1.06); }
.gallery-item .gal-overlay {
position: absolute; inset: 0;
background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(200,16,46,.3), transparent);
opacity: 0; transition: opacity .3s;
}
.gallery-item:hover .gal-overlay { opacity: 1; }

/* PROVA SOCIAL */
#prova { background: var(–bg2); }
.artists-grid {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(170px, 1fr));
gap: 14px; margin-top: 8px;
}
.artist-card {
background: var(–bg3); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
padding: 26px 18px; text-align: center;
position: relative; overflow: hidden;
transition: transform .3s, border-color .3s, box-shadow .3s;
}
.artist-card::before {
content: ‘’; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px;
background: linear-gradient(to right, var(–red), var(–gold));
transform: scaleX(0); transition: transform .3s;
}
.artist-card:hover { transform: translateY(-6px); border-color: rgba(212,160,23,.3); box-shadow: 0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5); }
.artist-card:hover::before { transform: scaleX(1); }
.artist-icon { font-size: 1.8rem; margin-bottom: 10px; }
.artist-name {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; font-weight: 700;
font-size: .95rem; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(–text);
}
.artist-badge {
display: inline-block; margin-top: 7px;
font-size: .62rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(–gold); opacity: .7;
}

/* CASAS DE SHOWS */
#casas { background: var(–bg); }
.venues-list {
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(200px, 1fr));
gap: 12px;
}
.venue-item {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
padding: 18px 20px; background: var(–bg3);
border-left: 3px solid var(–red);
transition: background .2s, border-color .2s, transform .2s;
}
.venue-item:hover { background: rgba(200,16,46,.08); border-color: var(–gold); transform: translateX(4px); }
.venue-num {
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif; font-size: 1.8rem;
color: rgba(200,16,46,.25); line-height: 1; min-width: 34px;
}
.venue-name {
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; font-weight: 600;
font-size: .95rem; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(–text);
}

/* HISTÓRIA */
#historia { background: var(–bg2); position: relative; overflow: hidden; }
#historia::before {
content: ‘”’; position: absolute; top: -20px; left: 4%;
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif; font-size: 18rem;
color: rgba(200,16,46,.04); line-height: 1; pointer-events: none;
}
.historia-inner {
display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
gap: 56px; align-items: center; position: relative; z-index: 1;
}
.historia-stat {
margin-top: 28px; padding: 18px;
background: var(–bg3); border-left: 3px solid var(–gold);
}
.historia-stat-num {
font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif; font-size: 2.8rem;
color: var(–gold); line-height: 1;
}
.historia-stat-label {
font-size: .78rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
color: var(–muted); margin-top: 4px;
}
.historia-text {
font-size: clamp(.95rem, 1.8vw, 1.2rem);
line-height: 1.95; color: rgba(232,224,208,.85); font-weight: 300;
}
.historia-text strong { color: var(–gold); font-weight: 600; }

/* CONTATO */
#contato { background: var(–bg); text-align: center; }
.contato-sub {
font-size: .95rem; color: var(–muted); letter-spacing: 2px;
margin-bottom: 44px;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase;
}
.contact-btns {
display: flex; gap: 14px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.contact-btn {
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
padding: 15px 30px; text-decoration: none;
font-family: ‘Barlow Condensed’, sans-serif;
font-size: .95rem; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase;
transition: transform .2s, box-shadow .2s; border-radius: 2px;
}
.contact-btn:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); }
.btn-whatsapp { background: #25d366; color: #000; }
.btn-whatsapp:hover { background: #1ebe5a; box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(37,211,102,.3); }
.btn-instagram { background: linear-gradient(135deg,#f09433,#e6683c,#dc2743,#cc2366,#bc1888); color:#fff; }
.btn-instagram:hover { box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(220,39,67,.4); }
.btn-youtube { background: var(–red); color: #fff; }
.btn-youtube:hover { background: var(–red-dark); box-shadow: 0 12px 30px rgba(200,16,46,.4); }
.contact-btn svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* FOOTER */
footer {
background: var(–bg2); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
padding: 28px 5%;
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px;
}
.footer-logo img { height: 38px; filter: brightness(.8); }
.footer-copy { font-size: .72rem; color: var(–muted); letter-spacing: 1px; }

/* MODAL */
.modal-bg {
position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 200;
background: rgba(0,0,0,.93);
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .3s;
}
.modal-bg.open { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
.modal-box {
width: 90%; max-width: 820px; aspect-ratio: 16/9;
background: #000; position: relative;
transform: scale(.95); transition: transform .3s;
}
.modal-bg.open .modal-box { transform: scale(1); }
.modal-box iframe { width: 100%; height: 100%; border: none; }
.modal-close {
position: absolute; top: -42px; right: 0;
background: none; border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 1.6rem;
cursor: pointer; font-family: ‘Bebas Neue’, sans-serif; letter-spacing: 2px;
display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}

/* LIGHTBOX */
.lightbox-bg {
position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 300;
background: rgba(0,0,0,.95);
display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; transition: opacity .3s;
}
.lightbox-bg.open { opacity: 1; pointer-events: all; }
.lightbox-img {
max-width: 90vw; max-height: 88vh;
border-radius: 4px; object-fit: contain;
transform: scale(.95); transition: transform .3s;
}
.lightbox-bg.open .lightbox-img { transform: scale(1); }
.lightbox-close {
position: absolute; top: 20px; right: 24px;
background: none; border: none; color: #fff; font-size: 2rem;
cursor: pointer; line-height: 1;
}

/* RESPONSIVE */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
.gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
.historia-inner { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 28px; }
:root { –card-w: 180px; –card-h: 108px; }
nav { padding: 12px 4%; }
section { padding: 48px 4%; }
}
@media (max-width: 480px) {
.nav-links { display: none; }
.contact-btns { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
.contact-btn { width: 100%; max-width: 300px; justify-content: center; }
.gallery-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 8px; }
}

/* REVEAL */
.reveal { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(28px); transition: opacity .7s, transform .7s; }
.reveal.visible { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
</style>

</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->

<nav id="navbar">
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Diego Cantor"></a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#videos">Vídeos</a>
    <a href="#galeria">Galeria</a>
    <a href="#prova">Shows</a>
    <a href="#historia">História</a>
    <a href="#contato">Contato</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->

<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg bg1 active" id="bg1"></div>
  <div class="hero-bg bg2" id="bg2"></div>
  <div class="hero-overlay"></div>
  <div class="hero-side-fade"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-logo-wrap">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Diego Cantor Logo">
    </div>
    <p class="hero-title">Cantor</p>
    <p class="hero-sub">Sua música. Sua história.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#videos" class="btn-primary">▶ &nbsp;Ver Show</a>
      <a href="#contato" class="btn-outline">Contratar</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- VÍDEOS -->

<section id="videos">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Entretenimento</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Vídeos</h2>

  <div class="row-block reveal">
    <div class="row-label">🎤 Ao Vivo</div>
    <div class="cards-row">
      <div class="card" data-video="aqWjOGJ2eGQ">
        <div class="card-thumb t1"><span>AO VIVO</span></div>
        <div class="card-overlay"><div class="card-play">▶</div></div>
        <div class="card-info">Ao Vivo</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="row-block reveal">
    <div class="row-label">⭐ Melhores Momentos</div>
    <div class="cards-row">
      <div class="card" data-video="PGqcjEDX920">
        <div class="card-thumb t2"><span>CLIPE</span></div>
        <div class="card-overlay"><div class="card-play">▶</div></div>
        <div class="card-info">Melhores Momentos</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="row-block reveal">
    <div class="row-label">🎸 Shows</div>
    <div class="cards-row">
      <div class="card" data-video="vfjxRJnhuKk">
        <div class="card-thumb t3"><span>SHOW</span></div>
        <div class="card-overlay"><div class="card-play">▶</div></div>
        <div class="card-info">Show</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- GALERIA -->

<section id="galeria">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Fotos</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Galeria</h2>
  <div class="gallery-grid reveal">
    <div class="gallery-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Diego Cantor">
      <div class="gal-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Diego Cantor">
      <div class="gal-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Diego Cantor">
      <div class="gal-overlay"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="gallery-item" onclick="openLightbox(this)">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Diego Cantor">
      <div class="gal-overlay"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- PROVA SOCIAL -->

<section id="prova">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Parceiros de Palco</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Artistas que já abriu show</h2>
  <div class="divider reveal"></div>
  <div class="artists-grid">
    <div class="artist-card reveal"><div class="artist-icon">🎵</div><div class="artist-name">Humberto &amp; Ronaldo</div><div class="artist-badge">Abertura</div></div>
    <div class="artist-card reveal"><div class="artist-icon">🎵</div><div class="artist-name">Marcos &amp; Belutti</div><div class="artist-badge">Abertura</div></div>
    <div class="artist-card reveal"><div class="artist-icon">🎵</div><div class="artist-name">Eduardo Costa</div><div class="artist-badge">Abertura</div></div>
    <div class="artist-card reveal"><div class="artist-icon">🎵</div><div class="artist-name">George Henrique &amp; Rodrigo</div><div class="artist-badge">Abertura</div></div>
    <div class="artist-card reveal"><div class="artist-icon">🎵</div><div class="artist-name">Fred &amp; Gustavo</div><div class="artist-badge">Abertura</div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CASAS DE SHOWS -->

<section id="casas">
  <p class="section-label reveal">Palcos</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal">Casas de Shows</h2>
  <div class="divider reveal"></div>
  <div class="venues-list">
    <div class="venue-item reveal"><span class="venue-num">01</span><span class="venue-name">Vila 567</span></div>
    <div class="venue-item reveal"><span class="venue-num">02</span><span class="venue-name">Folks</span></div>
    <div class="venue-item reveal"><span class="venue-num">03</span><span class="venue-name">Varanda Estaiada</span></div>
    <div class="venue-item reveal"><span class="venue-num">04</span><span class="venue-name">Ruazinha</span></div>
    <div class="venue-item reveal"><span class="venue-num">05</span><span class="venue-name">Rampas Chopp e Show</span></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- HISTÓRIA -->

<section id="historia">
  <div class="historia-inner">
    <div class="historia-left reveal">
      <p class="section-label">A Trajetória</p>
      <h2 class="section-title" style="margin-bottom:0">História</h2>
      <div class="divider"></div>
      <div class="historia-stat">
        <div class="historia-stat-num">8</div>
        <div class="historia-stat-label">Anos de idade na primeira TV</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="reveal">
      <p class="historia-text">
        Diego tem uma relação de amor com a música desde criança.
        Aos <strong>8 anos</strong> fez parte da agência <strong>Talentos Brilhantes de Moacyr Franco</strong>,
        cantando no programa <strong>Talentos na TV</strong> da <strong>Rede TV!</strong>
        <br><br>
        Desde então, Diego construiu uma trajetória sólida na música,
        abrindo shows para os maiores nomes do gênero e conquistando palcos
        das principais casas de shows do Brasil.
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTATO -->

<section id="contato">
  <p class="section-label reveal" style="text-align:center">Booking</p>
  <h2 class="section-title reveal" style="text-align:center">Entre em Contato</h2>
  <p class="contato-sub reveal">Agende seu show ou evento</p>
  <div class="contact-btns">
    <a class="contact-btn btn-whatsapp reveal" href="https://wa.me/5511991129170" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
      WhatsApp
    </a>
    <a class="contact-btn btn-instagram reveal" href="https://instagram.com/diegocantor" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zM12 0C8.741 0 8.333.014 7.053.072 2.695.272.273 2.69.073 7.052.014 8.333 0 8.741 0 12c0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98C8.333 23.986 8.741 24 12 24c3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98C15.668.014 15.259 0 12 0zm0 5.838a6.162 6.162 0 100 12.324 6.162 6.162 0 000-12.324zM12 16a4 4 0 110-8 4 4 0 010 8zm6.406-11.845a1.44 1.44 0 100 2.881 1.44 1.44 0 000-2.881z"/></svg>
      Instagram
    </a>
    <a class="contact-btn btn-youtube reveal" href="https://youtube.com/@diegocantoroficial" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M23.495 6.205a3.007 3.007 0 00-2.088-2.088c-1.87-.501-9.396-.501-9.396-.501s-7.507-.01-9.396.501A3.007 3.007 0 00.527 6.205a31.247 31.247 0 00-.522 5.805 31.247 31.247 0 00.522 5.783 3.007 3.007 0 002.088 2.088c1.868.502 9.396.502 9.396.502s7.506 0 9.396-.502a3.007 3.007 0 002.088-2.088 31.247 31.247 0 00.5-5.783 31.247 31.247 0 00-.5-5.805zM9.609 15.601V8.408l6.264 3.602z"/></svg>
      YouTube
    </a>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER -->

<footer>
  <div class="footer-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Diego Cantor"></div>
  <div class="footer-copy">© 2025 Diego Cantor — Todos os direitos reservados</div>
</footer>

<!-- MODAL VÍDEO -->

<div class="modal-bg" id="modal" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal-box">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">✕ Fechar</button>
    <iframe id="modal-iframe" src="" frameborder="0" allow="autoplay; encrypted-media" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- LIGHTBOX FOTO -->

<div class="lightbox-bg" id="lightbox" onclick="closeLightbox()">
  <button class="lightbox-close" onclick="closeLightbox()">✕</button>
  <img class="lightbox-img" id="lightbox-img" src="" alt="">
</div>

<script>
  // NAV scroll
  const navbar = document.getElementById('navbar');
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    navbar.classList.toggle('scrolled', window.scrollY > 50);
  });

  // Hero background crossfade
  const bg1 = document.getElementById('bg1');
  const bg2 = document.getElementById('bg2');
  let showingBg1 = true;
  setInterval(() => {
    if (showingBg1) {
      bg1.classList.remove('active'); bg1.classList.add('inactive');
      bg2.classList.remove('inactive'); bg2.classList.add('active');
    } else {
      bg2.classList.remove('active'); bg2.classList.add('inactive');
      bg1.classList.remove('inactive'); bg1.classList.add('active');
    }
    showingBg1 = !showingBg1;
  }, 5000);

  // Reveal on scroll
  const reveals = document.querySelectorAll('.reveal');
  const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
    entries.forEach((entry, i) => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        setTimeout(() => entry.target.classList.add('visible'), i * 55);
      }
    });
  }, { threshold: 0.08 });
  reveals.forEach(el => observer.observe(el));

  // Cards — abrir modal ou canal
  document.querySelectorAll('.card').forEach(card => {
    card.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const vid = card.getAttribute('data-video');
      if (vid && vid !== 'VIDEO_ID_1' && vid !== 'VIDEO_ID_2' && vid !== 'VIDEO_ID_3') {
        openModal(vid);
      } else {
        window.open('https://youtube.com/@diegocantoroficial', '_blank');
      }
    });
  });

  function openModal(videoId) {
    document.getElementById('modal-iframe').src =
      `https://www.youtube.com/embed/${['aqWjOGJ2eGQ','PGqcjEDX920'].includes(videoId) ? 'shorts/' + videoId : videoId}?autoplay=1&rel=0`;
    document.getElementById('modal').classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closeModal(e) {
    if (e && e.target !== document.getElementById('modal') && !e.target.closest('.modal-close')) return;
    document.getElementById('modal').classList.remove('open');
    document.getElementById('modal-iframe').src = '';
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  // Lightbox
  function openLightbox(el) {
    const src = el.querySelector('img').src;
    document.getElementById('lightbox-img').src = src;
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.add('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
  }
  function closeLightbox() {
    document.getElementById('lightbox').classList.remove('open');
    document.body.style.overflow = '';
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') { closeModal({}); closeLightbox(); }
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
